companyName.zh: 阿里巴巴集团 —— 生态编排者

summary.en: Founded in Hangzhou by Jack Ma in 1999 as Alibaba.com (B2B sourcing marketplace for Chinese export factories). The company grew into a multi-marketplace ecosystem orchestrator: Alibaba.com (B2B), Taobao (C2C launched 2003 to defeat eBay China), Tmall (B2C launched 2008), AliExpress (cross-border B2C launched 2010), Alipay (payments launched 2004 to solve trust on Taobao, later spun out as Ant Group 2014), Cainiao (logistics alliance launched 2013), Alibaba Cloud (B2B SaaS 2009-onward), DAMO Academy (R&D 2017+). NYSE IPO 2014 at ~$25B (then-record). Each sub-business is itself a multi-sided platform; the parent group's role is **orchestrator** — share user identity (Alipay account), share logistics (Cainiao), share data (Alimama ad platform), share regulatory + government relations. The 2020 Ant Group IPO halt by Chinese regulators marked the beginning of a multi-year platform-economy regulation cycle that reshaped the group's growth profile. This case is intentionally a parent / ecosystem view; AliExpress and Cainiao have their own dedicated sub-business cases for deeper coverage.
summary.zh: 1999 年由马云在杭州创立,最初是 Alibaba.com(中国出口工厂的 B2B 寻源市场)。公司发展为一个多市场的生态编排者:Alibaba.com(B2B)、淘宝(C2C,2003 年上线击败 eBay China)、天猫(B2C,2008 年上线)、AliExpress(跨境 B2C,2010 年上线)、支付宝(2004 年上线,初衷是解决淘宝的信任问题,后来 2014 年分拆为蚂蚁集团)、菜鸟(物流联盟,2013 年成立)、阿里云(B2B SaaS,2009 年起)、达摩院(研发,2017 年起)。2014 年纽交所上市,市值约 250 亿美元(当时纪录)。每个子业务本身都是一个多边平台;集团的角色是**编排者** —— 共享用户身份(支付宝账号)、共享物流(菜鸟)、共享数据(阿里妈妈广告平台)、共享监管与政府关系。2020 年中国监管层叫停蚂蚁 IPO 标志着此后多年「平台经济监管周期」的开端,重塑了集团的增长曲线。本案例是有意做的「集团 / 生态」视角;AliExpress 和菜鸟在库中各有专门的子业务案例,提供更深入的视角。

sources.label: Duncan Clark · Alibaba: The House That Jack Ma Built · Ecco · 2016
Ming Zeng · Smart Business: What Alibaba's Success Reveals About the Future of Strategy · Harvard Business Review Press · 2018
Osterwalder & Pigneur · Business Model Generation · Wiley · 2010 (Pattern No. 3, multi-sided-platforms pp. 76-81)
